mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.prompt_id, c.created_at, p.title, p.description, p.tags, p.clip_count, p.like_count, p.generate_count FROM clips c LEFT JOIN prompts p ON p.id = c.prompt_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}::uuid ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clips WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clips (id, user_id, prompt_id) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), #{userId}::uuid, #{promptId}::uuid) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM clips WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND prompt_id = #{promptId}::uuid
mapper.update: UPDATE prompts SET clip_count = clip_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE prompts SET clip_count = GREATEST(0, clip_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
